 Options View Legend Legend
Racenet Form Abbreviations
Legend
  • t = Won @ track
  • d = Won @ distance
  • HT = Home Track
  • o = Last or not in first nine last start
  • s = Won on soft
  • h = Won on heavy
  • n = Won at night
  • b = Beaten favourite latest run
  • (G) = Gelded
  • D/A = Dual Acceptors
Last 10 Results
  • x = Spell
  • F = Failed to finish
  • L = Lost rider
Abbreviations For Video Comments
  • App = approaching
  • H/Out = Hung Out
  • MF = midfield
  • S/A = slow away
  • TAL = tearaway leader
  • WB = well back
  • COT = Change of tactics
  • H/S = Hampered Start
  • MSG = Made some ground
  • SG = saved ground
  • t'out = throughout
  • Wd = weakened
  • DRO = didn't run on
  • J awk = Jumped awkwardly
  • NC = no cover
  • U/p = Under Pressure
  • tt = to turn
  • WPFT = Winning post first time
  • DGO = didn't go on
  • k-up = knocked up
  • O/L = outside lead
  • S/L = shared lead
  • u/u = used up
  • D/N = did nothing
  • L = lengths
  • O/R = over-raced
  • Strt = straight
  • WTMF = worse than midfield
  • H/In = Hung In
  • Lpos = lost position
  • ROS = Ran strongly in straight
  • t = turn
  • W = wide
  • WNC = wide no cover
Abbreviations for Pace of race
  • OPF = On Pace Favoured
  • BMF = Backmarkers favoured
  • F = Fair
Abbreviations for Track Analysis
  • TF = Track fair
  • BGW = Best going out wide
  • BGI = Best going inside
Print

R1 Tcl Trophy

1700m
Class: 3-Y-O & Up, Fillies & Mares, BM70, Handicap
Resulted
Tips & Race Analysis

Analysis

Can't imagine one of the top two not winning. JUNEBUG placed last start at Warwick Farm when first up and has the speed to overcome a very wide draw, a close top pick. FIRST CHORUS 2 wins from six attempts this campaign and just missed as favourite last start at Geelong, right in this. SAXON BEAUTY placed when unwanted in the betting last start at Moonee Valley and first time down at this distance, each-way claims. MEET THE WIFE last start winner to break maiden at Wangaratta on a soft track and drawn perfectly, the real danger in the race.

Selections

  • 2. Junebug (14) $15.00
  • 11. First Chorus (15) $5.00
  • 7. Saxon Beauty (9) $51.00
  • 18. Meet The Wife (1) $151.00

Results
